name: Lemon-Basil Carrot Bundles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut carrots into 80 (2 x 1/4 inch) strips.
2. In a nonaluminum saucepan, combine carrots, water, lemon juice, sugar, and garlic. Cover and cook over medium heat for 6 to 8 minutes, or until carrots are crisp-tender.
3. Remove from heat and place carrots in a shallow bowl, reserving the cooking liquid in the saucepan.
4. Add basil, lemon rind, and oil to the cooking liquid and set aside.
5. Trim the white portion from green onions; cut tops into 20 narrow strips.
6. Gather four carrot strips into a bundle and tie with an onion strip. Repeat with remaining carrot and onion strips.
7. Place bundles in a large shallow bowl. Pour basil mixture over bundles; cover and chill at least 1 hour.
8. Remove bundles from liquid using a slotted spoon; discard liquid. Arrange on serving platter lined with lemon slices if desired.
Fat: 0.3
Cholesterol: 0.
